content:
Overview Edge API Platform provides a single ingress layer for multiple internal services and public APIs.
Key Capabilities Unified JWT and API key authentication Tenant-aware rate limiting Canary routing and rollback strategies End-to-end request tracing and metrics Tech Stack Go, gRPC, REST Kubernetes + Helm OpenTelemetry + Prometheus + Grafana Outcome The platform reduced repeated gateway logic across teams and improved deployment safety through progressive delivery.
summary: A high-availability API gateway platform with unified auth, rate limiting, and observability.
title: Edge API Platform

content:
Why Versioning Matters Production APIs evolve continuously. Without versioning discipline, small changes can break existing consumers and slow delivery.
Strategy Keep backward compatibility as the default Use additive changes before structural replacements Reserve major version bumps for true contract changes Practical Rules Never repurpose a field with new semantics. Prefer introducing a new optional field first. Deprecate with clear timelines and migration examples. Track client usage before …
summary: Practical versioning patterns for evolving APIs without breaking clients.
title: API Versioning in Production

content:
Goal Observability should reduce time-to-detect and time-to-recover, not just generate dashboards.
Baseline Signals Metrics: latency, traffic, errors, saturation Logs: structured, queryable, correlated by trace IDs Traces: request path across critical service boundaries Instrumentation Priorities Define service-level objectives for key APIs. Add tracing to ingress, core business paths, and external calls. Emit consistent error taxonomy for alert routing. Build one incident dashboard per …
summary: A minimum, high-leverage observability baseline for microservice systems.
title: Observability Baseline for Microservices

content:
Overview Realtime Observability Suite centralizes logs, metrics, and traces for product and infrastructure workloads.
Key Capabilities Unified dashboard for service health and latency Alert routing to on-call channels Incident timeline with correlated events SLO tracking for critical APIs Tech Stack ClickHouse, Prometheus, Loki OpenTelemetry collectors React + TypeScript frontend Outcome The suite shortened incident detection and improved triage efficiency by providing one consistent operational …
summary: A realtime monitoring suite for services, jobs, and infra with alert pipelines and incident views.
title: Realtime Observability Suite
